calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Aug-24-2020 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned by Department 206 for Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Thomas Sestak on July 27 2020, and continued to today, August 24, 2020.
Dept: 514. Judge: Gerardo C Sandoval. Clerk: K. Dougherty. Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. Telephone: 415-551-3680. Email: gcasey@sftc.org.

Jason M. Burros, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Cavalry SPV I, LLC, as Assignee of Citibank, N.A.
Roxanne Jackson, Custodian of Records for Cavalry Portfolio Services, was placed under oath and testified.
Ms. Jackson appeared via CourtCall for this morning's proceedings.
No appearance by defendant Thomas Sestak.
Plaintiff's Complaint for Account Stated and Money Lent was filed on January 17, 2017.
Defendant's answer to the complaint was filed on April 18, 2017.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was served on May 20, 2020, with trial set for July 20, 2020. Department 206 continued this matter to July 27, 2020, and Department 514 continued the matter to today, August 24, 2020.
Notice of Trial for August 24, 2020 was served on defendant Thomas Sestak on July 24, 2020, and filed with the Clerk's Office on August 13, 2020.
Plaintiff's Trial Brief, Trial Exhibit List and Memorandum of Costs were filed on August 13, 2020.
DOE defendants dismissed today, August 24, 2020.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Cavalry SPV I, LLC, as Assignee of Citibank, N.A., and against defendant Thomas Sestak, as follows:

Principal/Damages - $44,562.65 (Amount pled in complaint).
Prejudgment Interest - Waived.
Attorney Fees - Waived.
Costs - $609.00.
Sub-Total - $45,171.65.
Minus Credit - $500.00.

Total - $44,671.65.

Counsel for plaintiff shall prepare the proposed Judgment and submit same to the Court for review and signature.
